_comment: Audit trail des 20 derniers cycles -- decisions ROLLBACK/PROCEED basees sur donnees objectives.

cycles.summary: Implemented runes minigame (ogham pair-matching, canvas-based, 4x4 grid, 15s timer, score 0-100). Added 20 FastRoute card templates for foret_broceliande+druides covering all 8 lexical fields and 5 factions. T001 (blank scenes) investigated but no issue found in code -- marked needs-repro.

Implemented equilibre minigame (balance cursor with wind gusts, 12s timer, score = % time in safe zone). Enhanced HUD with 5 faction reputation bars, anam counter, biome currency display with dynamic label. Added animated fog shader plane to CoastBiome (sin-wave noise, edge fade, time-driven animation). All 3/3 tasks completed. Bundle +1.92%.

Implemented herboristerie minigame (5x4 grid, identify target plant among toxic/safe, 15s timer, score with time bonus + wrong-pick penalty). Added 20 FastRoute cards for cotes_sauvages+niamh (coastal celtic themes: shipwrecks, sea caves, selkies, tidal pools, lighthouses). Added Ogham activation UI panel (slot system showing equipped oghams with cooldown indicators, skip button, shown before each card). 3/3 tasks completed. Bundle +3.62% (636->659 KB), well under 668 KB block threshold.

Implemented negociation minigame (scrolling word-based persuasion targeting faction keywords, combo system, 12s timer, score from faction word picks + combo bonus - neutral penalty + time bonus). Added 20 FastRoute cards for landes_bruyere+anciens (celtic moors themes: tumuli, cairns, stone circles, wild ponies, heather storms, ancient oaths, peat bogs, warrior processions). Wired ogham effect execution into EffectEngine with applyOghamEffect() for immediate effects (heal, currency, sacrifice) and processOghamModifiers() for card effect modifiers (block/cancel negatives, reduce high damage, double positives, invert effects). Game loop updated: ogham effects applied after selection, card effects processed through ogham modifiers, activeOgham cleared after use. 3/3 tasks completed. Bundle +3.64% (659->683 KB), under 692 KB WARN threshold.

Implemented combat_rituel minigame (circular dodge arena with rotating arc obstacles at various radii/speeds, 10s timer, score = survival time % + center bonus zone %). Implemented apaisement minigame (breathing rhythm sync with pulsing circle expand/contract cycle, 12s timer, click at peaks for accuracy, score = avg accuracy * tap count bonus). Added 20 FastRoute cards for villages_celtes+korrigans (market days, blacksmiths, traveling bards, hidden fairy doors, mischievous pranks, secret passages, talking tools, midnight dances, prophetic moss, enchanted mills). All caps respected (rep<=10, heal<=8, dmg<=5). 3/3 tasks completed. Bundle +3.81% (683->709 KB), under 717 KB WARN threshold. 7/14 minigames done. 86 card templates total.

Bundle optimization: Vite manual chunks split 709KB monolith into 3 chunks (three-core 529KB vendor + index 148KB app + minigames 60KB). App code now 208KB (-70.7%). Implemented sang_froid minigame (cursor tracking in progressively shrinking + drifting safe zone, 10s timer, score = % time inside). Implemented course minigame (QTE symbol chase with ogham characters, 8 rounds x 1.5s window, click target among 4 decoys, score = hits/rounds * 100). Added 20 FastRoute cards for cercles_pierres+druides (equinox rituals, ley line convergences, time slips, ogham inscriptions awakening, stargazing druids, sacred geometry, underground chambers, solstice fires, druide singing stones, healing rituals). All caps respected (rep<=10, heal<=8, dmg<=5). 4/4 tasks completed. 9/14 minigames done. 106 card templates total.

Implemented 3 new minigames: fouille (find target object 'Cle Ogham' etc among 15 decoy labels, 4-column grid with jitter, 2s position shuffle, 12s timer, score = 50 base + early find bonus), ombres (stealth corridor with sinusoidal winding path that narrows from 55px to 18px half-width, 40 segments, cursor-driven progress, collision penalty on score, 10s timer), volonte (hold cursor on pulsing center circle r=30 vs flashing colored distractor squares spawning every 0.6s accelerating, max 12 active, 10s timer, score = % time on target). Added 20 FastRoute cards for marais_korrigans+ankou (will-o-wisps, drowned crossroads, ghostly washerwomen/lavandieres, bog bodies, ankou's cart, death omens, spectral processions, ancestor bargains, singing reeds, spectral door to otherworld). All caps respected (rep<=10, heal<=8, dmg<=5). 4/4 tasks completed. 12/14 minigames done. 126 card templates total (106+20). App bundle 242KB (+34KB from card templates), under 280KB WARN. Remaining: regard + echo minigames, collines_dolmens + iles_mystiques card sets.
